name: carl-actionstudio
description: Parent package for easy Action Studio development.

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix ./NativeIntegration" "npm run start --prefix ./ImmersiveExperience" "npm run start --prefix ./GithubPagesSite" "node main.js"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ./NativeIntegration && npm run build --prefix ./ImmersiveExperience && npm run build --prefix ./GithubPagesSite

author: syntheticmagus
